### Overview
Security engineer focused on AI and agent security.

### Schedule
Thursday, April 23, 2026
- Primary: Advanced agent security workshop (id 4001), 13:00-14:00, T401, Full. This is the strongest fit for your goal.
- Alternative: Practical threat modeling for AI apps (id 4002), 13:00-14:00, T402, Not full. Same-slot fallback with strong security relevance.

### Tradeoffs
- If 4001 is a high-priority session, you can still line up in case of cancellations.
- I did not choose the networking cost-controls session because it is a weak fit for AI security.

### Explorer link
